attractions.name: Pura Puseh Batuan
attractions.description: Nearly 1,000-year-old ancient temple (founded 1022 AD) featuring intricate stone carvings and traditional palm fiber (ijuk) roofs. It is a prime example of transition between early classical architecture and later temple design.

seo.metaTitle: Pura Puseh Batuan | Ancient Balinese Temple
seo.metaDescription: Visit the 1,000-year-old Pura Puseh Batuan, a masterpiece of ancient Balinese stone architecture.

marketPieces.title: Authentic Batuan Style Painting
marketPieces.description: Dense and meticulous detail depicting mythological scenes. This painting captures the unique 'Batuan Wash' technique developed over generations in the village of arts.

seo.metaTitle: Authentic Batuan Style Painting - Local Art
seo.metaDescription: Explore high-quality Batuan style paintings, known for their intricate detail and mythological themes.

articles.title: The Sacred Gambuh Dance of Batuan

children.text: The Gambuh dance is believed to be the oldest Balinese dance form, dating back to the 15th century. It is a national treasure that is rare and highly valued for its cultural depth, often performed during temple anniversaries at Pura Puseh Batuan.

articles.author: Paige (Tech Writer)

seo.metaTitle: Sacred Gambuh Dance of Batuan | Balinese Heritage
seo.metaDescription: Learn about Gambuh, the oldest form of Balinese dance drama preserved in the village of Batuan.

global.siteDescription: Discover the heritage of Bali's famous Village of Arts. Home to ancient temples, intricate paintings, and the sacred Gambuh dance.

seo.metaTitle: Batuan Village | The Village of Arts
seo.metaDescription: Explore the rich cultural heritage of Batuan Village, Bali.

blocks.title: Welcome to Batuan Village
blocks.subtitle: Immerse yourself in a thousand years of Balinese art and culture.

blocks.title: The Village of Arts
blocks.content: Batuan is renowned globally for its distinct style of painting, intricate stone carvings, and being the home of the sacred Gambuh dance drama.

seo.metaDescription: The definitive guide to visiting Batuan Village, the art capital of Bali.
